headline: L3Harris Technologies (LHX): Expanding Growth With VAMPIRE Production and Strategic IPO Plans
summary: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LHX) is one of the best defense contractor stocks to buy right now. On March 24, L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LHX) began high‑volume production of its VAMPIRE counter‑drone systems in Huntsville, Alabama to meet growing demand from the U.S. and allies facing persistent drone threats. The facility features flexible assembly, testing, and installation […]
